name: CI/CD Process
description: CALM architecture validation and deployment pipeline. Validates an architecture against a pattern using the CALM CLI, then generates and applies Kubernetes manifests or a Docker Compose file.

nodes.name: Deployment Operator
nodes.description: Developer or CI runner that invokes the validate-and-deploy script

nodes.name: CI/CD Pipeline
nodes.description: System that packages the CALM CLI, template data assets, and URL mapping used for architecture validation and rendering

nodes.name: Approved Architecture Patterns/Standards/Controls
nodes.description: System that groups the approved architecture and pattern artifacts used as the source of truth for validation

nodes.name: Application System
nodes.description: System representing the application architecture definition that is validated and deployed by the CI/CD process

nodes.name: Pipeline Orchestrator
nodes.description: Service that orchestrates the validate-and-deploy pipeline steps on behalf of the Deployment Operator

nodes.name: Generate Kubernetes Deployment
nodes.description: Service responsible for generating Kubernetes manifests from the architecture using the CALM CLI and deploying them to the cluster

nodes.name: Generate Docker-Compose Deployment
nodes.description: Service responsible for generating a Docker Compose file from the architecture using the CALM CLI and starting services on the Docker engine

nodes.name: Deployer
nodes.description: Service responsible for applying generated deployment artifacts to the target infrastructure

nodes.name: CALM CLI
nodes.description: FINOS CALM CLI tool that validates architectures against patterns and renders architecture templates into deployment manifests

nodes.name: Architecture File
nodes.description: CALM architecture JSON file describing the system to be deployed (e.g. my-fullstack-k8s.architecture.json)

nodes.name: Pattern File
nodes.description: CALM pattern JSON file defining the structural constraints the architecture must conform to (docs/calm/patterns/my-fullstack.pattern.json)

nodes.name: Approved Standards
nodes.description: Approved standards artifacts used as part of the source of truth for architecture validation

nodes.name: Approved Controls
nodes.description: Approved control artifacts used as part of the source of truth for architecture validation

nodes.name: URL Mapping
nodes.description: JSON file mapping schema $ref URLs to local file paths, used during validation (docs/calm/url-mapping.json)

nodes.name: Kubernetes Manifest Template
nodes.description: Handlebars template rendered by the CALM CLI into a Kubernetes manifest file (docs/calm/templates/k8s-manifests.yaml.hbs)

nodes.name: Docker Compose Template
nodes.description: Handlebars template rendered by the CALM CLI into a Docker Compose file (docs/calm/templates/dc-compose.yaml.hbs)

nodes.name: Generated Kubernetes Manifests
nodes.description: Kubernetes manifest YAML file generated from the architecture by the CALM CLI (calm-generated-k8s/all-manifests.yaml)

nodes.name: Generated Docker Compose File
nodes.description: Docker Compose YAML file generated from the architecture by the CALM CLI (calm-generated-dc/docker-compose.yml)

nodes.name: Kubernetes Cluster
nodes.description: Target Kubernetes cluster to which manifests are applied via kubectl

nodes.name: Docker Engine
nodes.description: Target Docker host on which services are started via docker compose

relationships.description: Contains the approved architecture artifacts used by
Contains the application architecture definition used by
Contains the validation and templating assets used by
Deployment Operator interacts with the Pipeline Orchestrator to initiate pipeline execution
Pipeline Orchestrator delegates deployment of generated artifacts to the Deployer
Pipeline Orchestrator invokes the CALM CLI to perform architecture validation
Pipeline Orchestrator invokes the CALM CLI to generate deployment artifacts from the architecture
Pipeline Orchestrator delegates Kubernetes manifest generation and deployment to
Pipeline Orchestrator delegates Docker Compose file generation and deployment to
Reads and validates the architecture from
Reads the structural pattern constraints from
Resolves schema $ref URLs using
Reads the Kubernetes manifest Handlebars template from
Reads the Docker Compose Handlebars template from
Renders the architecture into Kubernetes manifests and writes to
Renders the architecture into a Docker Compose file and writes to
Deployer reads the generated Kubernetes manifests to apply to the cluster
Deployer reads the generated Docker Compose file to start services on the Docker engine
Applies generated manifests to
Starts services defined in the generated compose file on

flows.name: Kubernetes Deployment
flows.description: End-to-end process to validate a CALM architecture against its pattern and deploy generated Kubernetes manifests to the cluster.

transitions.description: CALM CLI reads the architecture file for validation
CALM CLI reads the pattern file to validate architecture against
CALM CLI resolves schema $ref URLs using the URL mapping
CALM CLI reads the Kubernetes Handlebars template
CALM CLI renders and writes the generated Kubernetes manifests
Generated manifests are applied to the Kubernetes cluster via kubectl

flows.name: Docker Compose Deployment
flows.description: End-to-end process to validate a CALM architecture against its pattern and deploy generated Docker Compose services to the Docker engine.

transitions.description: CALM CLI reads the architecture file for validation
CALM CLI reads the pattern file to validate architecture against
CALM CLI resolves schema $ref URLs using the URL mapping
CALM CLI reads the Docker Compose Handlebars template
CALM CLI renders and writes the generated Docker Compose file
Generated compose file is started on the Docker engine via docker compose up
